about.title: Why choose us?
about.p1: We have been providing professional polygraph (lie detector) services in Odessa for over 7 years. Our team of certified examiners has extensive experience working with corporate clients and private individuals.
about.p2: A polygraph test is the fastest, most reliable, and practically the only way to quickly verify whether a person is concealing information. If you find yourself in a difficult situation — don't delay reaching out to our experts.

accuracy.title: Polygraph accuracy for business
accuracy.p1: A modern polygraph records over 10 physiological parameters: breathing, pulse, blood pressure, galvanic skin response, and other indicators. Test accuracy reaches 95–98% when conducted properly.
accuracy.p2: For businesses, this means reliable protection against dishonest employees, safeguarding trade secrets, and effective resolution of internal conflicts.

reviews.title: Client reviews
reviews.subtitle: What people say after using our services

items.text: I came to check on my husband. I was very worried, but the specialist immediately put me at ease and explained the whole process. I received the written result the same day. Confidentiality was fully maintained — no one I know found out anything.
items.name: Natalia R.

items.text: We tested three candidates for a management position. One of them had concealed being dismissed from a previous job for embezzlement. Thanks to the polygraph, we avoided serious problems. I recommend it to all employers.
items.name: Andriy M.

items.text: After a series of thefts at our warehouse, we decided to test the staff. The testing revealed two guilty parties. The specialist worked efficiently without unnecessary stress for the team. Savings exceeded a full month's turnover.
items.name: Sergiy V.

items.text: I was unfairly accused of theft at work. I took the polygraph test — the results proved my innocence. Thank you for the clear and accurate conclusions. The matter was closed immediately after receiving the written report.
items.name: Oleksiy D.

items.text: We had a business partner tested before signing a major contract. The specialist conducted the test correctly and professionally. We gained confidence in the partner's honesty and now collaborate without any doubts.
items.name: Olena K.

items.text: A polygraph is stressful, but I was pleasantly impressed by the specialist's professionalism. He explained each stage and gave me time to calm down. After the test, I received a detailed written report. Very grateful for the tactful approach.
items.name: Iryna S.

faq.q: How long does a test take?
faq.a: A standard session lasts from 1.5 to 3 hours, depending on the number of questions.
Yes. Results are shared only with the client and are not disclosed to third parties.

faq.q: How to prepare for the test?
